All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AuditContext
AuditContext holds per-request user and request metadata.
AuditDispatcher
AuditDispatcher is a pluggable mechanism for routing audit logs.
AuditEntityListener
Listener that hooks into JPA lifecycle events to automatically audit entity changes.
AuditLog
AuditLog is the core structure for audit records.
AuditLogElasticRepository
Spring Data Elasticsearch repository for saving audit logs.

Step 1: Annotate your JPA entity
